list.title: Status pages
list.empty: No status pages yet. Create a page to share service health.
list.copyError: The status page link could not be copied.

builder.unavailableDescription: This page could not be loaded or you no longer have access to it.
builder.title: Status page builder
builder.invalidPage: Add a title and a lowercase slug using letters, numbers, or hyphens.
builder.selectAssignment: Select at least one assignment for this block.
builder.selectCheck: Select a check for this block.
builder.defaultDescription: Live availability and incident updates for our services.
builder.defaultFooter: Measurements are collected by Netstamp monitoring probes.
builder.basicDescription: Identity, publishing, visual mode, and public data boundaries.
builder.visibilityDescription: Anyone with the link can view this page.
builder.bannerHelper: New pages start with a fixed Picsum image URL. Replace it with any absolute HTTPS image URL.
builder.showTargetsDetail: May reveal IP addresses, hostnames, or internal URLs.
builder.showProbeNamesDetail: Publishes the configured probe display name.
builder.showLocationsDetail: Required for map coordinates and location labels.
builder.generatedTimeDetail: Show when the page data was last calculated.
builder.chooseDisplayDescription: Start with the information shape visitors should see.
builder.selectCheckDescription: Browse by monitor type, then choose the public service source.
builder.noChecksMatch: No checks match this category and search.
builder.noChecks: Create a check and assign a probe before adding a status block.
builder.dragIntoGroup: Drag a status block into this group
builder.groupSettingsDescription: Set the public heading and description for this service group.
builder.blockSettingsDescription: Choose the service source, presentation, and public label.

displayDetails.history: Emphasize recent disruptions and recovered periods.
displayDetails.map: Show public monitoring locations on a map.

builder.otherServicesDescription: Blocks that are not assigned to a group.
builder.buildViewDescription: Add a group, then add status, history, latency, or map blocks.
builder.fallbackFooter: Measurements are collected by configured Netstamp probes.
builder.enableLocations: Enable public probe locations to render this map.

public.notFoundDescription: This public status page is disabled or does not exist.
public.unavailableDescription: The controller could not return this status page right now.
public.defaultFooter: Measurements are collected by configured Netstamp probes.
public.activeDescription: Current service interruptions and ongoing investigation updates.
public.checksUnavailableDescription: The current status checks could not be loaded.
public.noElements: No public status elements are configured.
public.noLocations: No public probe locations are available for this block.
